_meta.description: 20 hand-labeled (facility x capability) ground-truth scenarios for the Trust-First Triage Desk. expected_status is the human label after reading the facility's source text; run_eval.py compares it against the live rules pipeline (classifier + evidence + trust_score + status_label). Fixtures in fixtures.json are the real Marketplace source rows.

scenarios.name: Aravind Eye Hospital
scenarios.rationale: Explicit, quantified: '22-bed Level II Intensive Care Unit (ICU) with 11 ventilator beds' plus multiple corroborating mentions.
scenarios.source_quote: 22-bed Level II Intensive Care Unit (ICU) with 11 ventilator beds

scenarios.name: Aravind Eye Hospital
scenarios.rationale: Quantified dialysis service under a named national programme.
scenarios.source_quote: Dialysis unit of 20 beds under Pradhan Mantri National Dialysis Programme

scenarios.name: SCB Medical College, Cuttack
scenarios.rationale: Regional Cancer Centre since 1981; chemotherapy, radiotherapy, surgical oncology all named.
scenarios.source_quote: Cancer wing expanded to include surgical oncology and chemotherapy services

scenarios.name: Krishna Institute of Medical Sciences
scenarios.rationale: NICU with Neonatal ECMO explicitly listed alongside PICU.
scenarios.source_quote: Neonatal Intensive Care Unit (NICU) and Pediatric Intensive Care Unit (PICU) with Neonatal ECMO

scenarios.name: Ankur Hospital
scenarios.rationale: Capability array explicitly denies NICU.
scenarios.source_quote: NICU facility not available

scenarios.name: Ankur Hospital
scenarios.rationale: Ultrasound/sonography explicitly unavailable.
scenarios.source_quote: Ultrasound (sonography) center not available

scenarios.name: SCB Medical College, Cuttack
scenarios.rationale: Trauma centre is NOT yet operational (under construction) — must not be presented as available.
scenarios.source_quote: A multi-specialty trauma center is under construction

scenarios.name: Rajindra Hospital, Patiala
scenarios.rationale: Trauma hospital under construction — claimed but not operational.
scenarios.source_quote: 300-bed trauma care hospital under construction to serve Patiala region

scenarios.name: Fortis Hospital, Gurugram
scenarios.rationale: Claimed only via structured specialty code 'criticalCareMedicine' with no descriptive corroboration.
scenarios.source_quote: criticalCareMedicine

scenarios.name: Fortis Hospital, Gurugram
scenarios.rationale: Specialty code 'emergencyMedicine' only; no supporting prose.
scenarios.source_quote: emergencyMedicine

scenarios.name: Aravind Eye Hospital
scenarios.rationale: An eye hospital lists OB/GYN specialty code but no maternity service described — code alone is weak.
scenarios.source_quote: gynecologyAndObstetrics

scenarios.name: Fortis Hospital Anandapur
scenarios.rationale: OB/GYN specialty code only, no descriptive support.
scenarios.source_quote: gynecologyAndObstetrics

scenarios.name: RAM Hospital, Kanpur
scenarios.rationale: OB/GYN specialty code only.
scenarios.source_quote: gynecologyAndObstetrics

scenarios.name: Rajindra Hospital, Patiala
scenarios.rationale: 'Specialised in cancer' but thin, and palliative care is gapped ('Morphine is not available') — not enough to call verified.
scenarios.source_quote: Specialised in cancer

scenarios.name: RAM Hospital, Kanpur
scenarios.rationale: NICU inferred from a single equipment-field mention (extraction_confidence 0.75); too weak to verify.
scenarios.source_quote: (equipment-field mention)

scenarios.name: Fatima Hospital
scenarios.rationale: Single procedure-field mention at low confidence; no corroboration.
scenarios.source_quote: (procedure-field mention)

scenarios.name: Krishna Institute of Medical Sciences
scenarios.rationale: Emergency IS genuinely offered ('Emergency & Critical Care services'; 'Emergency department in Secunderabad'), but mentions are terse so the pipeline finds only 1 support and under-calls it. KNOWN verified-recall gap.
scenarios.source_quote: Emergency & Critical Care services with Accident and Emergency Medicine and Critical Care

scenarios.name: Ankur Hospital
scenarios.rationale: ICU evidence is actually PEDIATRIC ICU ('pediatric intensive care unit capabilities'), not general adult ICU; treating PICU as ICU over-claims. Pipeline marks verified — edge case for 'intensive care' cue.
scenarios.source_quote: Pediatric intensive care unit capabilities with full-time consultants and staff

scenarios.name: Vedanta Hospital
scenarios.rationale: Facility is literally a trauma centre per description ('unit of Kanpur Trauma and Ortho Centre'), but trauma evidence sits in the description prose and only yields 1 support. KNOWN recall gap: description evidence under-weighted.
scenarios.source_quote: a unit of Kanpur Trauma and Ortho Centre

scenarios.name: Vedanta Hospital
scenarios.rationale: Precision check: a nearby negation 'Morphine not available' must NOT falsely contradict the oncology claim. Oncology is thinly mentioned (surgical oncologist on staff) so unclear is correct, and it should stay unclear (not contradicted).
scenarios.source_quote: Has Dr. Rohit Tekriwal, Surgical Oncologist, on staff
